2605.10177.title: MTA-RL: Robust Urban Driving via Multi-modal Transformer-based 3D Affordances and Reinforcement Learning
2605.10177.paper_summary: Robust urban autonomous driving requires reliable 3D scene understanding and stable decision-making under dense interactions. However, existing end-to-end models lack interpretability, while modular pipelines suffer from error propagation across brittle interfaces. This paper proposes MTA-RL, the first framework that bridges perception and control through Multi-modal Transformer-based 3D Affordances and Reinforcement Learning (RL). Unlike previous fusion models that directly regress actions, RGB images and LiDAR point clouds are fused using a transformer architecture to predict explicit, geometry-aware affordance representations. These structured representations serve as a compact observation space, enabling the RL policy to operate purely on predicted driving semantics, which significantly improves sample efficiency and stability. Extensive evaluations in CARLA Town01-03 across varying densities (20-60 background vehicles) show that MTA-RL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. Trained solely on Town03, our method demonstrates superior zero-shot generalization in unseen towns, achieving up to a 9.0% increase in Route Completion, an 11.0% increase in Total Distance, and an 83.7% improvement in Distance Per Violation. Furthermore, ablation studies confirm that our multi-modal fusion and reward shaping are critical, significantly outperforming image-only and unshaped variants, demonstrating the effectiveness of MTA-RL for robust urban autonomous driving.
2605.10177.paper_summary_zh: 穩健的城市自動駕駛需要可靠的 3D 場景理解和在密集互動下的穩定決策。<lb/>然而，現有的端到端模型缺乏可解釋性，而模組化管道則受到脆弱介面之間錯誤傳播的影響。<lb/>本文提出了 MTA-RL，這是第一個通過多模態Transformer基於 3D 可供性和強化學習 (RL) 橋接感知與控制的框架。<lb/>與之前直接回歸動作的融合模型不同，RGB 圖像和 LiDAR 點雲使用Transformer架構進行融合，以預測明確的、幾何感知的可供性表示。<lb/>這些結構化表示作為緊湊的觀察空間，使得 RL 策略能夠純粹基於預測的駕駛語義運作，顯著提高了樣本效率和穩定性。<lb/>在 CARLA Town01-03 進行的廣泛評估中，面對不同的密度（20-60 輛背景車輛），MTA-RL 始終優於最先進的基準。<lb/>僅在 Town03 上訓練，我們的方法在未見過的城鎮中顯示出優越的零樣本泛化，實現了路徑完成率提高高達 9.0%、總距離提高 11.0% 和每次違規距離改善 83.7%。<lb/>此外，消融研究證實我們的多模態融合和獎勵塑造至關重要，顯著優於僅使用圖像和未塑造變體，證明了 MTA-RL 在穩健城市自動駕駛中的有效性。
2605.10177.author: Guangli Chen et.al.
2605.10177.authors: Guangli Chen, Dianzhao Li, Wenjian Zhong, Bangquan Xie, Ostap Okhrin
